title: The Last Summer We Spoke
atmospheric_profile: worn wooden windowsill at dusk: handwritten letter tied with faded ribbon, old reading glasses, half-empty glass of water, soft golden-blue light, quiet waiting and memory
quality_notes: Exceptional quiet melancholy thumbnail. Strong emotional evidence of Lena Moreau's world — recurring motif of letters and light on wood. Perfect for Quiet Hour and Stories That Linger.
creator_continuity: Lena Moreau - recurring windowsill, letters, and late light
